blockingIssues.description: apply_refactor() method exists at line 3304 but is never invoked in execute(). The method signature and implementation are complete, but execute() only simulates refactoring application at lines 3533-3537 where it pushes to applied_opportunities with comments referencing apply_refactor() but never calling it. The method is dead code - confirmed via grep across entire codebase.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add enforcement that cargo clippy must be run before completing validation. Workers should verify with 'cargo clippy --workspace' and fix all warnings before marking a feature complete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-refactorer-validation worker did not run clippy despite skill procedure requiring it. The feature passed build but would have caught dead code warnings.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify feature scope boundaries. Consider requiring atomic commits per feature, or explicitly allowing multi-subsystem changes when necessary for a fix.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-coder-agent-llm modified files in multiple crates (orchestrator, state, llm, tools) despite being scoped to CoderAgent.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention for tracking deferred 'full implementation' items. Comments like 'In a full implementation...' appear but no tracking mechanism (TODO, FIXME, tracked issue) exists. Consider requiring such deferred items to have associated tracking comments.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Lines 3533-3537: 'Note: In a full implementation, we would generate actual refactored code... Apply the refactoring via apply_refactor()' - deferred implementation not tracked

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify when apply_refactor() should be called vs when simulation is acceptable. The refactorer-agent skill should specify if analysis-only mode is valid and when actual refactoring must be applied.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: execute() flow applies low-risk opportunities by pushing to applied_opportunities without calling apply_refactor(). Reviewer flagged this may be intentional for analysis-only mode but could confuse maintainers.
